implementationSummary: Phase 2.5-d App Review deploy config: split frontend (app-juli.com -> Next.js 127.0.0.1:3000) and backend (api.app-juli.com -> FastAPI 127.0.0.1:8000) under infra/deploy/. Independent systemd units (juli-web/juli-api), separate Nginx vhosts with HTTPS + /health + TikTok OAuth callback routing, placeholder-only env templates (no committed secrets), executable smoke-test.sh covering DNS/TLS/frontend/health/OAuth, and an app-review-runbook.md with install/validation steps. CI validates config contracts; live DNS/TLS wiring stays HITL (#256).
assumptions: Executor domain backend per infra/deploy + FastAPI service wiring; docs/config slice, no runtime code changes
TikTok OAuth callback route (/v1/auth/tiktok/callback) is proxied by Nginx now; the route handler itself lands in issue #259
Reviewer login uses existing Supabase phone-OTP endpoints (/v1/auth/otp/*)
summary.md VPS runbook was working-tree-only (not on main); canonical runbook now lives at infra/deploy/app-review-runbook.md
risks: Live smoke-test.sh cannot run in CI until DNS/TLS are wired on the VPS (HITL, #256)
Pre-existing: repo .env.example contains real-looking TIKTOK_APP_SECRET — out of scope for #253; flag for a security follow-up
Nginx OAuth callback location proxies a route that returns 404 until #259 implements the handler
